subject: (no subject)
body:
Good morning.
I received your phone message lastnight.  I will absolutely call you but this moment isn't a good time.  I'll call you this weekend.  Hope you are well and things are getting better.  It's strange you not being present like before, so many times I'll have a life question or need a sound business guidance and calling you is always first to my mind.  I really do miss that.   
Until this wekend, take care.

cd
